title: EvaluationConfig
description: Schema for evaluation configuration in the BenchCore benchmark pack.

dataset_path.description: Path to the evaluation dataset CSV file.

metrics.description: Metric families to compute and report.

macro_precision_recall_f1.description: Compute macro-averaged precision, recall, and F1.

micro_precision_recall_f1.description: Compute micro-averaged precision, recall, and F1.

top_k_hit_rate.description: Compute top-k hit rate for ranked predictions.

mrr.description: Compute mean reciprocal rank for ranked predictions.

cost_weighted_macro_f1.description: Compute macro F1 weighted by per-label cost coefficients.

top_k.description: Value of k for top-k metrics.

baseline_path.description: Path to a baseline results JSON for regression comparison, or null.

bootstrap_iterations.description: Number of bootstrap iterations for confidence intervals. 0 disables bootstrapping.

confidence_level.description: Confidence level for bootstrap intervals (e.g., 0.95 for 95% CI).

regression_check.description: Whether to perform regression check against baseline.

deployment_gates.description: Deployment gate conditions that must be satisfied.

pass_threshold.description: Minimum fraction of gates that must pass for deployment approval.
